channel.title: tutorial on Miguel Vila's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in tutorial on Miguel Vila's Blog

item.title: A Seamless Tailscale Experience: Bypassing Password Prompts
item.description: If you, like me, use Tailscale daily, you’ve probably felt the irritation of being prompted for a password every time you tweak a setting. Whether it’s switching exit nodes, changing accounts, or adjusting other settings, those password prompts can be realy annoying. Let’s change this behavior. Why Does Tailscale Ask for Root Privileges? Tailscale isn’t trying to upset you. It changes the network configuration of the system: the routing table, the DNS servers, etc.
